title: Print commitID with --layers
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

When the --layers option is used, the final imageID was
not being printed in the final line.  It was printed two
lines prior.  We still have to print the one two lines up
(at least without major modifications), but now we print
it in the last line as it does for all other circumstances
so it can be grabbed by scripts.

Fixes: #1237
```
Test Runs:
##################

# buildah bud --layers -t tom -f /root/Dockerfile.squashA .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 8e402f1a9c57 [======================================] 2.6MiB / 2.6MiB
Copying config 5cb3aa00f8 [======================================] 1.5KiB / 1.5KiB
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2: RUN touch /a
--> f26b1b0e2b27bbdde89e00c9b7310ee84b76f30433d90c4c0796a670d5b2ae82
STEP 3: FROM f26b1b0e2b27bbdde89e00c9b7310ee84b76f30433d90c4c0796a670d5b2ae82
STEP 4: ENV foo /bar
--> 427dccab8b15e485cc1160734e92b40e9790cc88ef288a17e9cbd377b29c0e75
STEP 5: COMMIT tom
--> 427dccab8b15e485cc1160734e92b40e9790cc88ef288a17e9cbd377b29c0e75

# buildah bud --layers -t tom -f /root/Dockerfile.squashA .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
STEP 2: RUN touch /a
--> Using cache f26b1b0e2b27bbdde89e00c9b7310ee84b76f30433d90c4c0796a670d5b2ae82
STEP 3: FROM f26b1b0e2b27bbdde89e00c9b7310ee84b76f30433d90c4c0796a670d5b2ae82
STEP 4: ENV foo /bar
--> Using cache 427dccab8b15e485cc1160734e92b40e9790cc88ef288a17e9cbd377b29c0e75
STEP 5: COMMIT tom
--> 427dccab8b15e485cc1160734e92b40e9790cc88ef288a17e9cbd377b29c0e75

# buildah bud  -t tom -f /root/Dockerfile.squashA .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
STEP 2: RUN touch /a
STEP 3: ENV foo /bar
STEP 4: COMMIT containers-storage:[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage]localhost/tom:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob bcf2f368fe23 [======================================] 5.5MiB / 5.5MiB
Copying blob f421733f63fc [======================================] 3.5KiB / 3.5KiB
Copying config 3ea8c93681 [======================================] 715b / 715b
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 3ea8c93681d535bbf441b23eedfc72756a7f3fe6b8a5e05126c1636b4def9648
```

comments.body:
@rhatdan I'm not 100% sure of which format you're asking about, the way the final line is displayed or the value within the line?   In short the last line of output for the `buildah bud` command is now consistent on success with or without the `--layers` option.   That is it displays an arrow with the full imageID following it for the created image on the last line of output.  Here's some examples for you:

With layers:
```
# buildah bud --layers -t tom -f /root/Dockerfile.squashA .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
Getting image source signatures
{edited out for brevity}
STEP 4: ENV foo /bar
--> b02167e483c13a6345ddc97d5b17b65f3da4e13a96c5f50aa5484392ddba5cf4
STEP 5: COMMIT tom
--> b02167e483c13a6345ddc97d5b17b65f3da4e13a96c5f50aa5484392ddba5cf4

# buildah images
IMAGE NAME                                               IMAGE TAG            IMAGE ID             CREATED AT             SIZE
localhost/tom                                            latest               b02167e483c1         Mar 11, 2019 13:15     5.8 MB
```

Without Layers:
```
# buildah bud -t tom -f /root/Dockerfile.squashA .
STEP 1: FROM alpine
Getting image source signatures
{edited for brevity}
Copying config 04f37de6ae [======================================] 715b / 715b
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 04f37de6ae94cfc3354f4d9e87078e62988eb49853cbceff2822a35211eb074c

# buildah images
IMAGE NAME                                               IMAGE TAG            IMAGE ID             CREATED AT             SIZE
localhost/tom                                            latest               04f37de6ae94         Mar 11, 2019 13:19     5.8 MB
```

I'm not real crazy about showing the layer/imageId twice in the last three lines with `--layers`, but not doing that is a little more challenging code wise.
